headline: 'Grand Theft Auto 6' Video Game Sales Off To Strong Start
summary: Sales of video game "Grand Theft Auto 6" from Take-Two Interactive Software appear to be off to a strong start. TTWO stock rose Thursday.

raw.headline: 'Grand Theft Auto 6' Video Game Sales Off To Strong Start
raw.summary: Sales of video game "Grand Theft Auto 6" from Take-Two Interactive Software appear to be off to a strong start. TTWO stock rose Thursday.

headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Take-Two Interactive, Maintains $293 Price Target
summary: BTIG  analyst Clark Lampen   reiterates Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ:TTWO) with a Buy and maintains $293 price target.
